title: Iliad, Book 20: The Gods at War
description: Book 20 of Homer's Iliad: The Gods at War.
introduction: Book 20 of the Iliad: The Gods at War. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ὣς οἱ μὲν παρὰ νηυσὶ κορωνίσι θωρήσσοντο.
translation.text: Zeus gave the gods leave to join the battle. Ares and Aphrodite and Apollo fought for Troy. Athena and Poseidon and Hera fought for Greece. Achilles sought Hector but could not find him. He fought Aeneas instead, and Poseidon saved the Trojan prince, for he was destined to rule.
